# ReelGet

> Free online video downloader — paste any social media URL to save the video instantly. No login, no app, no watermark.

ReelGet is a free web tool that lets anyone download videos from Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Twitter/X, Pinterest, Snapchat, LinkedIn, Reddit, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Twitch, and Threads. It works directly in the browser with no account or software required.

## How to use

1. Copy the URL of any video from a supported platform.
2. Go to reelget.com and paste the URL into the input box.
3. Click "Download" and choose your preferred quality (HD or SD).
4. The video saves directly to your device.

## Key features

- Download Instagram Reels, video posts, and Stories
- Download TikTok videos without the watermark
- Download YouTube videos and Shorts (public videos only)
- Download Facebook videos and Reels
- Download Twitter/X videos
- Download Pinterest video pins
- Extract MP3 audio from YouTube videos
- Download YouTube video thumbnails (HD, HQ, MQ)
- View auto-generated video transcripts
- PWA: installable on Android, works as a share-target from the share sheet
- Download history with re-download and delete controls
- Trending YouTube videos section (by category: All, Music, Gaming, Films)

## Supported platforms

Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Twitter/X, Pinterest, Snapchat, LinkedIn, Reddit, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Twitch, Threads

## Pricing

Free. No plans, no subscriptions, no hidden fees.

## Privacy

ReelGet does not store URLs, does not save downloaded videos, and does not require an account. All processing happens in real time on the server and nothing is retained.

## Available languages

English, Hindi, Bengali, Indonesian, Urdu, Portuguese, Tamil, Telugu, Arabic, Vietnamese, Odia, French, Swahili, Filipino, Hausa, Amharic, Spanish, Russian, Turkish, Thai, Korean

## URL structure

- Homepage: reelget.com/en
- Platform pages: reelget.com/en/instagram, reelget.com/en/tiktok, reelget.com/en/youtube, etc.
- Localized: reelget.com/hi (Hindi), reelget.com/id (Indonesian), etc.

## Contact / Source

Site: https://reelget.com
